units.description: Length preservation: the output has the same length as the input. (Variant 3 stresses boundary preconditions and explicit edge-case coverage in the informal contract.)
common_failure_modes: stating only a length bound instead of equality

units.description: Sortedness: the output is sorted in nondecreasing order. (Variant 3 stresses boundary preconditions and explicit edge-case coverage in the informal contract.)
Permutation: the output is a permutation of the input (equal multiset of elements). (Variant 3 stresses boundary preconditions and explicit edge-case coverage in the informal contract.)
Stability is NOT required by the spec. (Variant 3 stresses boundary preconditions and explicit edge-case coverage in the informal contract.)
